name: golang-github-xdg-go-stringprep-dev
title: golang-github-xdg-go-stringprep-dev
summary: RFC-3454 stringprep and RFC-4013 SASLprep in Go (library)
description:
RFC-3454 stringprep and RFC-4013 SASLprep in Go (library)
This library provides an implementation of the stringprep algorithm
(RFC-3454) in Go, including all data tables.
.
A pre-built SASLprep (RFC-4013) profile is provided as well.
